item.title: [Segurança] Critical Citrix NetScaler memory flaw actively exploited in attacks
item.description:
🚨 Critical Citrix NetScaler memory flaw actively exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hackers are exploiting a critical severity vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-3055, in Citrix NetScaler ADC and NetScaler Gateway appliances to obtain sensitive data.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/critical-citrix-netscaler-memory-flaw-actively-exploited-in-attacks/

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-3124 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-3124 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
The Download Monitor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Insecure Direct Object Reference in all versions up to, and including, 5.1.7 via the executePayment() function due to missing validation on a user controlled key. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to complete arbitrary pending orders by exploiting a mismatch between the PayPal transaction token and the local order, allowing theft of paid di...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3124

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8134-1: pyasn1 vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8134-1: pyasn1 vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that pyasn1 could exhaust system resources when attempting to decode a malformed certificate. An attacker could possibly use this to cause a denial of service. (CVE-2026-23490) Kevin Tu discovered that pyasn1 could exhaust system resources via uncontrolled recursion when attempting to decode malicously-crafted certificates. An attacker could possibly use this to cause a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8134-1

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8136-1: Dovecot vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8136-1: Dovecot vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Dovecot incorrectly handled invalid base64 SASL data. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of service. (CVE-2025-59028) It was discovered that Dovecot script decode2text.sh incorrectly handled zip files. An attacker could possibly use this issue to obtain sensitive information. (CVE-2025-59031) It was discovered that Dovecot incorrectly handled certain AUTHENTICATE reques...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8136-1

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-2275 - Docker
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-2275 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The CrewAI CodeInterpreter tool falls back to SandboxPython when it cannot reach Docker, which can enable RCE through arbitrary C function calling.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2275

item.title: [Infraestrutura] CVE-2026-33027 - Nginx
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-33027 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Nginx UI is a web user interface for the Nginx web server. Prior to version 2.3.4, the nginx-ui configuration improperly handles URL-encoded traversal sequences. When specially crafted paths are supplied, the backend resolves them to the base Nginx configuration directory and executes the operation on the base directory (/etc/nginx). In particular, this allows an authenticated user to remove the entire /etc/nginx dir...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33027

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] USN-8127-1: ImageMagick vulnerabilities
item.description:
🚨 USN-8127-1: ImageMagick vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 6.0
Resumo:
It was discovered that ImageMagick did not properly process certain tags prior to an image being loaded. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause ImageMagick to crash, resulting in a denial of service. (CVE-2026-23952) It was discovered that ImageMagick did not properly handle temporary file creation failures. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause ImageMagick to crash, resulting in a denial of...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8127-1

item.title: [Segurança] CISA orders feds to patch actively exploited Citrix flaw by Thursday
item.description:
💣 CISA orders feds to patch actively exploited Citrix flaw by Thursday
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) ordered government agencies to patch their Citrix NetScaler appliances against an actively exploited vulnerability by Thursday.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-orders-feds-to-patch-actively-exploited-citrix-flaw-by-thursday/

item.title: [Segurança] StrongSwan Flaw Allows Unauthenticated Attackers to Crash VPNs
item.description:
💣 StrongSwan Flaw Allows Unauthenticated Attackers to Crash VPNs
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: SecurityWeek
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Remotely exploitable, the integer underflow vulnerability impacts StrongSwan releases spanning 15 years.
Link: https://www.securityweek.com/strongswan-flaw-allows-unauthenticated-attackers-to-crash-vpns/

item.title: [Segurança] The AI Arms Race – Why Unified Exposure Management Is Becoming a Boardroom Priority
item.description:
💣 The AI Arms Race – Why Unified Exposure Management Is Becoming a Boardroom Priority
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The cybersecurity landscape is accelerating at an unprecedented rate. What is emerging is not simply a rise in the number of vulnerabilities or tools, but a dramatic increase in speed. Speed of attack, speed of exploitation, and speed of change across modern environments. This is the defining challenge of the new era of digital warfare: the weaponization of Artificial Intelligence.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/the-ai-arms-race-why-unified-exposure.html

item.title: [Inteligência de Ameaças] A Vulnerability in F5 Products Could Allow for Remote Code Execution
item.description:
📢 A Vulnerability in F5 Products Could Allow for Remote Code Execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: CIS Advisories
Fonte: CIS Advisories
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a CIS Advisories, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://www.cisecurity.org/advisory/a-vulnerability-in-f5-products-could-allow-for-remote-code-execution_2026-026

item.title: [Segurança] ⚡ Weekly Recap: Telecom Sleeper Cells, LLM Jailbreaks, Apple Forces U.K. Age Checks and More
item.description:
📰 ⚡ Weekly Recap: Telecom Sleeper Cells, LLM Jailbreaks, Apple Forces U.K. Age Checks and More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Long-running operations are finally hitting courtrooms, old attack methods are showing up in new places, and research that stopped being theoretical right around the time defenders stopped paying attention. Persistence plays, legal wins, influence ops, and at least one thing that looks boring
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/weekly-recap-telecom-sleeper-cells-llm.html

item.title: [Segurança] Dutch Finance Ministry takes treasury banking portal offline after breach
item.description:
📰 Dutch Finance Ministry takes treasury banking portal offline after breach
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Dutch Ministry of Finance took some of its systems offline, including the digital portal for treasury banking, while investigating a cyberattack detected two weeks ago.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/dutch-finance-ministry-takes-treasury-banking-portal-offline-after-breach/
